L1.head: conformational breathing dynamics of GPCRs
L1.claim: GPCR构象呼吸动力学产瞬时变构口袋

L1.head: transient allosteric pockets
L1.claim: 膜脂相互作用稳定瞬时变构口袋

L1.head: membrane lipid interactions
L1.claim: 脂质相互作用通过构象状态调节实现功能调控

L1.head: transient allosteric pockets
L1.claim: 瞬时变构口袋暴露隐秘结合位点

L1.head: cryptic binding sites
L1.claim: 隐秘结合位点暴露为药物靶向提供机会

L2.head: GPCR activation states
L2.claim: 特定激活状态与ECL2波动幅度相关联

L2.head: ECL2 fluctuation amplitude
L2.claim: ECL2波动幅度决定配体结合口袋可及性

L2.head: ligand-binding pocket accessibility
L2.claim: 配体口袋开放性增强G蛋白偶联效率

L2.head: polyunsaturated fatty acids
L2.claim: 多不饱和脂肪酸占据TM6/7保守脂质位点

L2.head: conserved lipid interaction site
L2.claim: 保守位点结合稳定开放构象

L2.head: open conformations
L2.claim: 开放构象增加侧向药物通道概率

L2.head: lateral drug access
L2.claim: 侧向通道促进变构调节剂在胞内界面结合
